query:
INSERT INTO module_videos (moduleId, title, titleSwahili, description, descriptionSwahili, videoUrl, duration, lessonNumber, `order`, isPublished, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES 
(16, 'Lesson 1: God''s Grace Comes First', 'Somo 1: Neema ya Mungu Inakuja Kwanza', 'Introduction to prevenient grace - God''s love reaching us before we ask', 'Utangulizi wa neema inayokuja kabla - Upendo wa Mungu unakukamatiana kwanza', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/wesleyan-lesson-1-grace_35b0a405.mp4', 180, 1, 1, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(16, 'Lesson 2: Becoming More Like Jesus', 'Somo 2: Kuwa Kama Yesu', 'Understanding sanctification - growing closer to God daily', 'Kuelewa utakatifu - kukaribiana na Mungu kila siku', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/wesleyan-lesson-2-sanctification_6b6e3529.mp4', 180, 2, 2, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(16, 'Lesson 3: Personal Faith AND Community Responsibility', 'Somo 3: Imani ya Kibinafsi na Jukumu la Jamii', 'Social holiness - faith combined with action and justice', 'Utakatifu wa kijamii - imani pamoja na matendo na haki', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/wesleyan-lesson-3-social-holiness_1f9ad57c.mp4', 180, 3, 3, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(16, 'Lesson 4: Using Money Wisely', 'Somo 4: Kutumia Pesa Kwa Busara', 'Christian stewardship - Wesley''s three rules for money', 'Ukamatianaji wa Kikristo - sheria tatu za Wesley za pesa', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/wesleyan-lesson-4-stewardship_de9b62c0.mp4', 180, 4, 4, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(16, 'Lesson 5: The Power of Small Groups', 'Somo 5: Nguvu ya Vikundi Vidogo', 'Spiritual growth in community - Methodist bands and classes', 'Ukuaji wa roho katika jamii - Methodist bands na classes', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/wesleyan-lesson-5-small-groups_8ee522f4.mp4', 180, 5, 5, 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(16, 'Lesson 6: Living Out Your Faith Every Day', 'Somo 6: Kuishi Imani Yako Kila Siku', 'Practical holiness - making daily choices that reflect faith', 'Utakatifu wa vitendo - kufanya chaguo kila siku kinachoonyesha imani', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663416906571/kBmgeZHWTyHuceHoeAKRrp/wesleyan-lesson-6-practical-holiness_810edbb7.mp4', 180, 6, 6, 1, NOW(), NOW())
